title: Cricket Game with Multi-Format, IPL/BBL/Domestic Leagues, Country Teams & Login

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity-based user authentication so users must log in before accessing any game features. Display a login screen with a 'Login with Internet Identity' button. After login, show the user's principal ID and a logout option.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users see a login page and cannot access game content
Clicking 'Login with Internet Identity' triggers Internet Identity authentication
After successful login, the user is redirected to the main dashboard
User principal ID is stored and displayed in the UI
Logout button clears the session and returns to the login screen

requirements.text: Create a backend data model for all international cricket country teams (e.g., India, Australia, England, Pakistan, South Africa, New Zealand, West Indies, Sri Lanka, Bangladesh, Afghanistan, Zimbabwe, Ireland, and others) with attributes: team name, country code, jersey color, squad roster (player names, batting/bowling ratings).
acceptanceCriteria: At least 12 international teams are seeded in the backend
Each team has name, country code, jersey color, and a squad of players
Each player has batting rating and bowling rating attributes
Backend exposes a query to list all teams and fetch team details by ID

requirements.text: Implement three cricket match formats: Test (5-day, up to 2 innings each), ODI (50 overs per side), and T20 (20 overs per side). The game engine must simulate match outcomes ball by ball including runs scored, wickets, extras, and innings completion based on format rules.
acceptanceCriteria: T20 format simulates 20 overs per innings
ODI format simulates 50 overs per innings
Test format simulates up to 2 innings per team over a match
Match simulation produces a scorecard with runs, wickets, overs
Match result (win/loss/draw/tie) is computed and stored

requirements.text: Create an IPL (Indian Premier League) tournament mode with all 10 IPL franchise teams (e.g., Mumbai Indians, Chennai Super Kings, Royal Challengers Bangalore, Kolkata Knight Riders, Delhi Capitals, Punjab Kings, Rajasthan Royals, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Lucknow Super Giants, Gujarat Titans). Use T20 format. Include a group stage (round-robin) and knockout rounds (Qualifier 1, Eliminator, Qualifier 2, Final).
acceptanceCriteria: All 10 IPL teams are available with names and colors
Tournament generates a full round-robin group stage schedule
Points table tracks wins, losses, and net run rate
Top 4 teams advance to knockout rounds
Final match determines the IPL champion
Tournament progress and results are persisted in the backend

requirements.text: Create a BBL (Big Bash League) tournament mode with all 8 BBL franchise teams (Sydney Sixers, Sydney Thunder, Melbourne Stars, Melbourne Renegades, Brisbane Heat, Adelaide Strikers, Hobart Hurricanes, Perth Scorchers). Use T20 format with a group stage and finals series.
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 BBL teams are available with names and colors
Tournament generates a round-robin group stage schedule
Points table tracks wins, losses, and net run rate
Top teams advance to finals series
Finals series determines the BBL champion
Tournament progress and results are persisted

requirements.text: Create a Domestic cricket tournament mode representing major domestic leagues (e.g., Ranji Trophy - India, Sheffield Shield - Australia, County Championship - England). Allow selection of domestic teams per league. Support both multi-day (Test-like) and limited-overs format depending on the selected domestic competition.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 domestic competitions are available (Ranji Trophy, Sheffield Shield, County Championship)
Each domestic league has its own set of teams
Players can start a domestic tournament and simulate matches
Standings/points tables are shown per domestic competition
Results are saved to the backend

requirements.text: Build a main dashboard that lets the authenticated user choose between: International (country vs country) matches, IPL tournament, BBL tournament, and Domestic leagues. Show ongoing and completed tournaments/matches for the logged-in user.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays four clearly labelled sections: International, IPL, BBL, Domestic
Each section is accessible via a navigation card or tab
Active/ongoing games and completed results are visible
Only authenticated users can see the dashboard

requirements.text: Implement a match simulation screen that displays a live-style scorecard during a simulated match: current batsmen, bowler, score, overs, fall of wickets, and recent ball-by-ball commentary. Show a 'Next Ball' or 'Auto-Simulate' button to progress the match.
acceptanceCriteria: Scorecard updates after each simulated ball/over
Current batting and bowling partnerships are displayed
Recent ball-by-ball commentary is shown (e.g., '4! Cover drive', 'OUT! Caught at mid-on')
Innings summary and match result screen shown at match end

requirements.text: Apply a bold cricket-themed visual design: dark green pitch-inspired background, gold and white accent colors, cricket-inspired typography, stadium-atmosphere UI with card-based layouts for teams and scores. Enforce this style consistently across all screens.
acceptanceCriteria: All screens use the dark green + gold + white color palette
Cricket-themed iconography and layout patterns are consistent
Typography is bold and legible on dark backgrounds
Login screen, dashboard, team selection, and match screens all share the same visual theme

constraints: Authentication must use Internet Identity only — no username/password or third-party auth
All game state and match data must be persisted in the Motoko backend actor
All Motoko logic must remain in a single main actor file (backend/main.mo)
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real-time multiplayer or WebSocket-based live match streaming
Actual live cricket data feeds or third-party sports APIs
Mobile app or React Native version

required: Cricket stadium panoramic banner with floodlights and green pitch at night (stadium-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Cricket ball close-up illustration with red leather and white seam on dark background (cricket-ball-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Cricket bat silhouette icon in gold on dark green background (cricket-bat-icon.dim_128x128.png)
IPL trophy cup golden illustration on dark background (ipl-trophy.dim_256x256.png)
BBL Big Bash lightning bolt logo-style graphic in teal and gold (bbl-logo.dim_256x256.png)
